1.description: get Stavanger kommunenummer and bounding box

2.description: select parcels (teig) in Stavanger by kommunenummer

3.description: inspect DISTINCT arjordbr codes within Stavanger bbox from step1

4.description: select AR50 polygons for agricultural codes within Stavanger bbox

5.description: find teig parcels that intersect agricultural AR50 polygons

6.description: deduplicate parcels to one row per teigid
